sources.expression: get_option('niteoCS_counter_heading', 'STAY TUNED, WE ARE LAUNCHING SOON...')
get_option('niteoCS_contact_content', 'Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry.')

get_option('niteoCS_counter_heading', 'STAY TUNED, WE ARE LAUNCHING SOON...')

sinks.expression: printf(__('If %s plugin is installed and activated then Cookie notice will be automatically displayed also on Coming Soon page.', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance'), 'Cookie Notice')
printf(__('Compatibility with %s plugin is disabled.', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance'), 'Cookie Notice')

printf( esc_html__( 'You have been using %1$s plugin for %2$s now! Please leave a quick review or feedback to help us grow our little plugin. Thank you.', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance' ), esc_html( $this->name ), esc_html( $time ) )
printf( '%2$s', esc_url( 'https://wordpress.org/support/plugin/cmp-coming-soon-maintenance/reviews/?rate=5#new-post' ), esc_html__( 'Leave feedback', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance' ) )
wp_die( 'Sorry, but this request is invalid.' )
printf( esc_html__( 'You can customize the Coming Soon Page in %1$s or activate the Coming Soon Mode by Top bar CMP icon right away!', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance' ), 'CMP Settings')
printf(__('Enter Unsplash Collection URL or Collection ID.', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance'), 'https://unsplash.com/collections/')

printf( __('If the list is empty, please make sure you have installed %s plugin and you have created a Contact Form. If not, you can create new Contact Form in %s > Contact > New', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance'), 'Contact Form 7', 'Admin')

printf(__('If you are having trouble with 3rd-party shortcodes you can %1$s', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance'), sprintf('%s', __('disable automatic paragraphs function.', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance')))
printf( __('* Did you know you can translate Subscribe form Labels and Placeholders to your language in %s Settings?', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance'), 'Translation')
printf(__('You can find or create new API key in your %s.', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance'), 'MailChimp Account')

printf( __('Google reCAPTCHA protects you against spam and other types of automated abuse. %1$s', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance'), sprintf('%s',__('How to set reCAPTCHA v3?', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance')))

sink.expression: wp_die( 'Sorry, but this request is invalid.' )
wp_die( 'Sorry, but this request is invalid.' )

printf(__('If you are having trouble with 3rd-party shortcodes you can %1$s', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance'), sprintf('%s', __('disable automatic paragraphs function.', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance')))
printf( __('* Did you know you can translate Subscribe form Labels and Placeholders to your language in %s Settings?', 'cmp-coming-soon-maintenance'), 'Translation')
